sentences.text: Your bakery is on the map

You went from one page to a connected, published multi-page site — and you now know the three dials, how to keep your usage lasting, and how Plan mode structures a big build before a single file changes.
So far you've built websites: pages that sit and wait for visitors.
Next lesson, Make Your Project Interactive, you'll cross into apps — things that hold your data, respond to you, and grow feature by feature.
Same Claude Code, a different kind of work.
